Worth Every Rupiah

Coba jujur, kamu pernah kan kepikiran ini?

😔

Beli saham karena lihat konten atau dapat notifikasi — turun dikit langsung panik jual, rugi lagi...

😔

Tidak pernah punya trading plan — tidak tahu harus cut loss di harga berapa sampai akhirnya nyangkut dalam...

😔

Tidak ada waktu belajar analisa teknikal — kerja 9-to-5, pulang malam, tidak ada tenaga buat mantengin chart...

😔

Sudah rugi 2–3 kali tapi tidak tahu kenapa — tidak ada catatan, tidak ada evaluasi, pola yang sama terus berulang...

Kalau iya, ini SOLUSI yang kamu cari! 🔥

Kenapa Ini Bisa Jadi Titik Balik dari Trading yang Selalu Rugi? 💡

Dulu, orang yang mau trading serius harus ikut kursus Rp 500k–5jt, duduk berjam-jam belajar indikator teknikal, dan tetap tidak tahu apakah keputusannya benar atau salah. Sekarang? Dengan 1 prompt ke ChatGPT dan 3 variabel sederhana, kamu punya trading plan lengkap dalam 10 menit — entry, stop-loss, take-profit, dan position sizing sudah dihitung.

Tanpa perlu bisa baca chart rumit.
Tanpa harus ikut kursus mahal dulu.
Tanpa perlu mantengin grafik dari pagi sampai sore.
SEMUA SUDAH KAMI SIAPKAN! ✅

PlanTrade paling tepat untuk:

Karyawan 9-to-5 Yang mau trading sambil kerja — butuh sistem cepat yang bisa dikerjakan di jam istirahat.
Mahasiswa aktif di Ajaib/Stockbit Yang sudah coba beli saham tapi masih impulsif — butuh filter keputusan sebelum klik order.
Trader yang sudah rugi 2–3× Yang sadar butuh sistem tapi tidak tahu harus mulai dari mana — PlanTrade adalah titik mulai yang jelas.
Siapa saja Yang punya aplikasi sekuritas di HP dan mau keputusan jual-beli saham berdasarkan rencana, bukan emosi.

Apa aja yang bakal kamu dapatkan?

Kamu tidak perlu buang waktu belajar trading dari nol selama berbulan-bulan. Kami sudah menyusun bundle sistem lengkap yang bisa langsung kamu pakai hari ini — dari generate trading plan, filter keputusan sebelum beli, sampai track performa tradingmu secara otomatis.

Isi Bundle PlanTrade

📄

PDF PANDUAN PLANTRADE

8–10 halaman sistematis — overview cara kerja, cara baca output AI, cheat sheet 3 indikator dalam plain language Indonesia. Baca 5 menit, langsung bisa jalan. 🎯

🤖

SISTEM PROMPT CHAIN CHATGPT

2 prompt terstruktur siap copy-paste — khusus untuk saham IDX. Input nama ticker + harga target + modal → AI generate trading plan 1-halaman dengan entry, stop-loss, TP1, TP2, dan position sizing. 🚀

✅

CHECKLIST 7 PERTANYAAN "LAYAK BELI?"

Circuit-breaker untuk keputusan impulsif. Jawab 7 pertanyaan pendek sebelum klik order. Kalau lebih dari 3 jawaban "tidak" — sistem bilang tahan dulu. Emosi tidak ikut campur. 💡

📊

GOOGLE SHEETS TRADING LOG TEMPLATE

Input setiap trade → spreadsheet hitung win rate, rata-rata profit, rata-rata loss, dan expectancy secara otomatis. Tahu persis apakah sistem kamu improving atau perlu disesuaikan. 📈

🎁

BONUS EKSKLUSIF

Senilai Rp 1.150.000++
01
Cheat Sheet 3 Indikator Basic (MA, RSI, Volume) Format 1 halaman, plain language — baca 5 menit, langsung tahu sinyal beli atau tunggu tanpa harus duduk berjam-jam di depan chart. (Senilai Rp 150.000)
02

03
Template Evaluasi Bulanan Trading Review performa trading kamu setiap bulan — identifikasi pola saham mana yang konsisten profit, mana yang harus dihindari, dan apa yang perlu diperbaiki di bulan berikutnya. (Senilai Rp 250.000)
04
Daftar 20 Saham Liquid IDX untuk Pemula 20 saham dari LQ45 dan IDX30 yang paling cocok untuk prompt PlanTrade — likuid, spread kecil, volume konsisten. Biar sistem prompt bekerja paling optimal. (Senilai Rp 150.000)
05
Panduan Cara Baca Output ChatGPT untuk Trading Petunjuk singkat untuk memahami setiap baris output dari prompt PlanTrade — apa artinya entry range, kenapa stop-loss di angka itu, dan cara memvalidasi hasilnya sebelum eksekusi. (Senilai Rp 200.000)
06
Contoh 5 Trading Plan Lengkap (Studi Kasus Nyata) 5 contoh trading plan output nyata dari sistem PlanTrade untuk saham BBCA, TLKM, SIDO, ACES, dan ICBP — bisa dijadikan referensi format dan cara baca hasilnya. (Senilai Rp 200.000)
Total nilai semua deliverable + bonus eksklusif yang kamu dapatkan: Rp 1.649.000+

Bayangin Ini deh...

HP yang biasanya cuma buat scroll TikTok saham dan panik lihat harga turun, sekarang berubah jadi "pusat kontrol" — tempat kamu punya rencana sebelum setiap keputusan.

Pagi sebelum berangkat kerja, kamu lihat notifikasi saham TLKM. Dulu? Langsung beli karena FOMO. Sekarang? Kamu buka ChatGPT, paste prompt PlanTrade, isi 3 variabel — 5 menit, trading plan lengkap sudah ada.

Jam istirahat kantor, kamu buka trading log di Google Sheets. Centang hasil trade minggu lalu. Win rate sudah terhitung otomatis. 3 trade ini bulan: 2 profit, 1 kena stop-loss tapi controlable. Evaluasi jadi 5 menit, bukan 1 jam bingung.

Sore pulang kerja, ada saham menarik dari forum Stockbit. Kamu tidak langsung beli — kamu jalankan checklist 7 pertanyaan dulu. Pertanyaan ke-4 bilang "tidak". Kamu tahan. Besoknya saham itu turun 4%. Kamu tidak rugi hari itu.

Akhir bulan, kamu buka spreadsheet. Win rate 54%. Rata-rata profit 3.2%. Rata-rata loss 1.8%. Kamu tahu persis sistem kamu bekerja — dan angka mana yang perlu diperbaiki.

Semua itu dilakukan dari HP dan laptop yang sama, tanpa perlu berhenti kerja, tanpa harus jadi analis profesional, tanpa modal tambahan besar.

🚀 Ini bukan sekadar kumpulan template. Ini adalah Sistem Trading Terstruktur PlanTrade — yang sudah bantu ratusan trader muda Indonesia punya rencana sebelum setiap keputusan beli. Dan sekarang... 💚 Giliran kamu mulai trading dengan sistem sendiri!

Kenapa Harus Ambil PlanTrade Sekarang?

Bukan sekadar eBook teori!
Ini sistem siap eksekusi hari ini — prompt, checklist, dan log sudah siap pakai!
Bukan kursus saham mahal Rp 500k–5jt!
Rp 99k one-time — cocok untuk modal Rp 200k–2jt, langsung bisa dipakai tanpa belajar dulu!
Tidak perlu tunggu "ngerti dulu"!
Trading plan pertama kamu selesai dalam 10 menit — bahkan kalau ini pertama kalinya pakai sistem!

KESEMPATAN TERAKHIR — Harga Khusus 50 Pembeli Pertama

Setiap hari tanpa sistem, ada satu trade impulsif yang bisa terjadi. Satu keputusan panik yang menguras 2–3× harga PlanTrade itu sendiri. Kamu sudah tahu rasanya rugi karena tidak punya rencana — dan kamu sudah tahu berapa mahalnya "belajar dari pengalaman" itu. PlanTrade ada untuk memutus pola itu. Tapi harga Rp 99k ini hanya untuk 50 pembeli pertama HARI INI.

Sekali bayar · Akses selamanya · Download via email

Yang Sering Ditanyain 💬

Produknya dalam bentuk apa dan gimana cara aksesnya?

Bundle digital ya! Setelah pembayaran dikonfirmasi, link download dikirim ke email kamu dalam 5 menit. Bundle berisi 4 file: PDF Panduan PlanTrade, file teks Sistem Prompt Chain, Checklist 7 Pertanyaan, dan Google Sheets Trading Log Template. Tidak perlu nunggu paket fisik — langsung bisa dipakai hari ini! 😊

Aku sama sekali belum mengerti trading — apakah PlanTrade cocok buat aku?

PlanTrade dirancang untuk yang sudah punya aplikasi sekuritas dan sudah pernah beli saham minimal 1–2 kali. Kalau kamu belum pernah buka akun sekuritas sama sekali, sebaiknya mulai dari sana dulu. Tapi kalau kamu sudah pernah beli saham dan merasa tidak punya sistem — ini tepat untuk kamu. Semua langkah ditulis step-by-step, tidak ada jargon teknikal berlebihan. 👍

Aksesnya selamanya atau ada batas waktunya?

SELAMANYA! Sekali beli, akses selamanya. Kalau ada update atau versi baru bundle PlanTrade, kamu juga dapat GRATIS. Tidak ada biaya langganan, tidak ada expired date. 😊

Apakah perlu berlangganan ChatGPT Plus (berbayar) untuk pakai sistemnya?

Tidak perlu! ChatGPT versi gratis (GPT-3.5) sudah cukup untuk menjalankan sistem prompt PlanTrade. Kalau kamu kebetulan punya akses GPT-4, hasilnya akan lebih detail — tapi sama sekali tidak wajib. Akun ChatGPT gratis sudah cukup. 🤝

Apakah output AI-nya akurat dan bisa langsung dipercaya buat keputusan investasi?

Output AI membantu kamu punya kerangka analisis — entry range, stop-loss, take-profit, dan position sizing berdasarkan input yang kamu berikan. Ini adalah alat bantu berpikir, bukan rekomendasi investasi resmi. Semua keputusan beli/jual tetap ada di tanganmu. Checklist 7 Pertanyaan ada justru untuk memastikan kamu tetap berpikir kritis sebelum eksekusi. 👍

Modal awal yang dibutuhkan untuk mulai trading pakai sistem ini berapa?

Sistem PlanTrade dirancang untuk modal Rp 200k–2jt — range yang paling umum untuk trader pemula di Indonesia. Position sizing di prompt sudah memperhitungkan risk tolerance 2% per trade, jadi bisa disesuaikan berapa pun modalmu. Saham yang paling cocok dipakai adalah saham liquid LQ45 dan IDX30 — list 20 saham rekomendasinya sudah termasuk di bonus bundle. 😊

Kamu sudah baca sampai sini — artinya kamu serius mau punya sistem. 🎯

PlanTrade = trading plan lengkap dalam 10 menit. Entry, stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing — semua dihitung AI untuk saham IDX pilihanmu. Checklist anti-impulsif + trading log otomatis sudah termasuk. Satu bundle, Rp 99k, akses selamanya.

Breakpoints: 640, 768, 1024, 1280 ============================================================ */ /* ============================================================ 0. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES (BVI Palette) ============================================================ */ :root { /* Background */ --bg-base: #FAFAFA; --bg-sage: #EFF4EF; --bg-sage-deep: #E8EFE8; --bg-dark: #1A2A1A; /* Accent */ --primary: #1A7A3C; --primary-dark: #0F5C2A; --primary-bright: #21944A; --primary-glow: rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.25); --primary-border: rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.12); --olive: #6B7C3A; --olive-dark: #556130; --teal: #0F8A6E; --teal-dark: #077358; --teal-bg: rgba(15, 138, 110, 0.10); --teal-border: rgba(15, 138, 110, 0.30); --blue: #2A6EBB; --blue-dark: #1A5494; /* Text */ --text-primary: #1A1F1A; --text-secondary: #3D4D3D; --text-muted: #7A8C7A; --text-on-dark: #FAFAFA; --text-red: #C0392B; /* Surface */ --surface: #FFFFFF; --border: rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.12); --border-light: rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.08); /* Shadow */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); --shadow-md: 0 2px 12px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); --shadow-lg: 0 4px 24px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); --shadow-cta: 0 4px 16px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.25); --shadow-cta-hover: 0 6px 24px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.35); /* Typography */ --font-display: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; --font-body: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; /* Layout */ --container: 720px; --container-wide: 1100px; --radius-card: 14px; --radius-btn: 8px; --radius-badge: 6px; /* Spacing */ --section-pad-v: 60px; --section-pad-h: 20px; } /* ============================================================ 1. RESET & BASE ============================================================ */ *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; scroll-padding-top: 80px; } body { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--text-primary); background-color: var(--bg-base); -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; padding-bottom: 72px; /* sticky CTA clearance mobile */ } img, video { display: block; max-width: 100%; height: auto; } a { color: var(--primary); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s ease; } a:hover { color: var(--primary-bright); } /* Screen reader only */ .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; } /* ============================================================ 2. LAYOUT ============================================================ */ .container { width: 100%; max-width: var(--container); margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 var(--section-pad-h); } section, header { padding: var(--section-pad-v) 0; } /* ============================================================ 3. TYPOGRAPHY ============================================================ */ h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: var(--text-primary); } h1 { font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 7vw, 2.75rem); } h2 { font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 5vw, 2rem); } h3 { font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 4vw, 1.35rem); } p { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-secondary); } strong { color: var(--text-primary); font-weight: 700; } .section-title { font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 5vw, 2rem); margin-bottom: 32px; color: var(--text-primary); } .section-title--center { text-align: center; } .section-title--light { color: var(--text-on-dark); } /* ============================================================ 4. BUTTONS & CTAs ============================================================ */ .cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 28px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border-radius: var(--radius-btn); border: none; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, background 0.15s ease; min-height: 52px; white-space: nowrap; } .cta--primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: var(--shadow-cta); } .cta--primary:hover, .cta--primary:focus-visible { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary-bright) 0%, var(--primary) 100%); box-shadow: var(--shadow-cta-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); color: #FFFFFF; } .cta--primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .cta--full { display: flex; width: 100%; } .cta--large { padding: 18px 32px; font-size: 1.05rem; min-height: 56px; } /* Pulse animation on hero CTA */ @keyframes pulse-glow { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: var(--shadow-cta); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.15), var(--shadow-cta-hover); } } .hero .cta--primary { animation: pulse-glow 2.5s ease infinite; } .hero .cta--primary:hover { animation: none; } /* ============================================================ 5. BADGES ============================================================ */ .badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 5px 12px; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: var(--radius-badge); } .badge--teal { background: var(--teal-bg); color: var(--teal); border: 1px solid var(--teal-border); } .badge--green { background: rgba(26,122,60,0.10); color: var(--primary); border: 1px solid rgba(26,122,60,0.25); } /* ============================================================ 6. SECTION 1 — HERO ============================================================ */ .hero { background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, var(--bg-sage) 100%); padding-top: 48px; padding-bottom: 48px; overflow: hidden; } .hero__inner { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 40px; } .hero__content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; } .hero__tagline { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .hero__headline { font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 7.5vw, 2.85rem); line-height: 1.1; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: var(--text-primary); } .hero__headline--accent { color: var(--primary); display: inline; } .hero__subheadline { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-secondary); max-width: 560px; } .hero__subheadline strong { color: var(--primary); } .hero__proof-bar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; padding: 16px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .proof-bar__item { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; } .proof-bar__num { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--teal); white-space: nowrap; } .proof-bar__label { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .proof-bar__divider { display: none; } .hero__cta-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .hero__cta-note { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; } /* Hero Mockup Document */ .hero__visual { width: 100%; } .hero__mockup { display: flex; justify-content: center; } .mockup-doc { background: var(--surface); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); padding: 20px; width: 100%; max-width: 340px; font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.8rem; } .mockup-doc__header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .mockup-doc__badge { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); } .mockup-doc__date { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .mockup-doc__row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light); } .mockup-doc__label { font-size: 0.72rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--font-body); } .mockup-doc__val { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-primary); } .mockup-doc__val--green { color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; } .mockup-doc__val--red { color: var(--text-red); font-weight: 700; } .mockup-doc__val--teal { color: var(--teal); font-weight: 700; } .mockup-doc__divider { margin: 12px 0 10px; border-top: 1px dashed var(--border); } .mockup-doc__check { font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--primary); padding: 3px 0; } .mockup-doc__timer { margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border-light); font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: right; font-family: var(--font-body); } .mockup-doc__timer strong { color: var(--teal); } /* ============================================================ 7. SECTION 2 — TESTIMONIAL CAROUSEL ============================================================ */ .testi-carousel { background: var(--bg-sage); padding: var(--section-pad-v) 0; } .testi-carousel__title { font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 4.5vw, 1.75rem); text-align: center; margin-bottom: 28px; color: var(--text-primary); } .testi-track { display: flex; gap: 16px; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; padding-bottom: 4px; /* Hide scrollbar */ scrollbar-width: none; -ms-overflow-style: none; } .testi-track::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .testi-card { flex: 0 0 calc(100% - 16px); scroll-snap-align: start; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 24px 20px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .testi-card__emoji { font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 1; } .testi-card__quote { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--text-secondary); border: none; font-style: normal; flex: 1; } .testi-card__quote strong { color: var(--primary); } .testi-card__tag { display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 10px; background: var(--teal-bg); color: var(--teal); border: 1px solid var(--teal-border); border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; align-self: flex-start; font-family: var(--font-body); } .testi-dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; justify-content: center; margin-top: 20px; } .testi-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--border); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, width 0.2s; } .testi-dot--active { background: var(--primary); width: 20px; border-radius: 4px; } /* ============================================================ 8. SECTION 3 — PAIN VALIDATION ============================================================ */ .pain { background: var(--bg-base); } .pain__list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .pain__item { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; padding: 18px 16px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .pain__icon { font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .pain__item p { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 0; } .pain__resolution { padding: 18px 20px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: var(--radius-card); text-align: center; } /* ============================================================ 9. SECTION 4 — OPPORTUNITY REFRAME ============================================================ */ .reframe { background: var(--bg-sage); } .reframe__contrast { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 20px; margin-bottom: 24px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .reframe__contrast-body { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-secondary); } .reframe__negation { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 32px; padding: 20px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .reframe__neg-item { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-secondary); padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .reframe__neg-item::before { content: "✓"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; } .reframe__neg-stamp { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary); padding-top: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); margin-top: 8px; } .reframe__segments-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); margin-bottom: 16px; font-family: var(--font-display); } .reframe__segment-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; } .reframe__segment { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .reframe__segment strong { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--primary); font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 700; } .reframe__segment span { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.5; } /* ============================================================ 10. SECTION 5 — PACKAGE INTRO ============================================================ */ .package-intro { background: var(--bg-base); padding: 40px 0; } .package-intro__body { text-align: center; font-size: 0.95rem; max-width: 580px; margin: 0 auto; color: var(--text-secondary); } /* ============================================================ 11. SECTION 6 — CORE DELIVERABLES ============================================================ */ .deliverables { background: var(--bg-base); padding-top: 0; } .deliverables__grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 16px; } .deliverable-card { display: flex; gap: 16px; background: var(--surface); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 20px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .deliverable-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg); } .deliverable-card__icon { font-size: 1.75rem; flex-shrink: 0; width: 48px; height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: var(--bg-sage); border-radius: 10px; } .deliverable-card__content { flex: 1; } .deliverable-card__title { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .deliverable-card__desc { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--text-secondary); } /* ============================================================ 12. SECTION 7 — BONUS STACK ============================================================ */ .bonus { background: var(--bg-sage); } .bonus__header { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 32px; text-align: center; } .bonus__icon { font-size: 2rem; } .bonus__title { font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 5vw, 2rem); color: var(--text-primary); font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 800; } .bonus__value-tag { display: inline-flex; padding: 6px 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--teal) 0%, var(--teal-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 100px; } .bonus__list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 28px; } .bonus__item { display: flex; gap: 14px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 16px 18px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); align-items: flex-start; } .bonus__num { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-muted); flex-shrink: 0; min-width: 24px; padding-top: 2px; } .bonus__content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; flex: 1; } .bonus__name { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); } .bonus__desc { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-secondary); line-height: 1.55; } .bonus__price { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--teal); font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-body); margin-top: 2px; } .bonus__total { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 20px 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; text-align: center; } .bonus__total-label { font-size: 0.875rem; opacity: 0.85; font-family: var(--font-body); } .bonus__total-value { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 800; color: #FFFFFF; } /* ============================================================ 13. SECTION 8 — TRANSFORMATION / BAYANGIN ============================================================ */ .transformation { background: var(--bg-base); } .transformation__narrative { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 28px; padding: 24px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); } .transformation__narrative p { font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: 1.75; color: var(--text-secondary); } .transformation__narrative p strong { color: var(--primary); font-weight: 700; } .transformation__promise { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-dark) 0%, #122212 100%); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.3); } .transformation__promise p { color: #E8F0E8; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.7; } .transformation__promise strong { color: #A8D8A8; } /* ============================================================ 14. SECTION 9 — WHY NOW / SCARCITY ============================================================ */ .why-now { background: var(--bg-sage); } .why-now__bullets { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 32px; } .why-now__bullet { background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-card); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); } .why-now__bullet-left { padding: 12px 16px; background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.06); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .why-now__no { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-red); font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-display); } .why-now__bullet-right { padding: 12px 16px; } .why-now__yes { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--primary); font-weight: 600; font-family: var(--font-display); } .why-now__last-chance { background: var(--surface); border: 2px solid var(--primary); border-radius: var(--radius-card); padding: 20px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); } .why-now__last-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary); margin-bottom: 12px; font-family: var(--font-display); } .why-now__last-body { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-secondary); } /* ============================================================ 15. SECTION 10 — PRICING ============================================================ */ .pricing { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-dark) 0%, #0A1A0A 100%); } .pricing .section-title--light { color: #E8F0E8; margin-bottom: 32px; } .pricing__card { background: var(--surface); border: 2px solid var(--primary); border-radius: 18px; padding: 28px 24px; max-width: 520px; margin: 0 auto; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.18); } .pricing__badge { display: inline-flex; padding: 6px 14px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary) 0%, var(--primary-dark) 100%); color: #FFFFFF; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border-radius: 100px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .pricing__tiers { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 24px; padding-bottom: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .pricing__tier { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .pricing__tier-label { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--font-body); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .pricing__tier-price { font-family: var(--font-display); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.1; } .pricing__tier-price--strike { font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-decoration: line-through; } .pricing__tier-price--muted { font-size: 1.25rem; color: var(--text-muted); } .pricing__tier-price--main { font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--primary); } .pricing__tier-discount { font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--teal); font-family: var(--font-body); } .pricing__daily-cost { background: var(--bg-sage); border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 16px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .pricing__daily-cost p { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary); } .pricing__daily-cost strong { color: var(--teal); } .pricing__daily-cost--sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; } .pricing__inclusions { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .pricing__inclusions li { font-size: 0.9rem; color: var(--text-secondary); padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .pricing__inclusions li:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .pricing__scarcity { background: rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.15); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; margin-bottom: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-red); font-weight: 500; font-family: var(--font-body); } .pricing__scarcity strong { color: var(--text-red); } .pricing__urgency { margin-bottom: 24px; } .pricing__urgency p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--text-muted); line-height: 1.65; } .pricing__sub-note { text-align: center; font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 10px; } .pricing__disclaimer { max-width: 520px; margin: 24px auto 0; font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); text-align: center; line-height: 1.6; opacity: 0.7; } /* ============================================================ 16. SECTION 11 — FAQ ============================================================ */ .faq-wrap { background: var(--bg-base); } .faq { max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .faq__item { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .faq__q { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 18px 4px; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary); cursor: pointer; list-style: none; gap: 12px; line-height: 1.4; min-height: 56px; } .faq__q::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .faq__q::after { content: "+"; font-size: 1.4rem; color: var(--primary); flex-shrink: 0; font-weight: 400; transition: transform 0.2s ease; line-height: 1; } .faq__item[open] .faq__q::after { content: "−"; } .faq__a { padding: 4px 4px 20px; animation: faqFadeIn 0.2s ease; } .faq__a p { font-size: 0.9rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-secondary); } @keyframes faqFadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } /* ============================================================ 17. SECTION 12 — CONVERSION CTA STRIP ============================================================ */ .cta-strip { background: var(--bg-sage); text-align: center; } .cta-strip__title { font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 4.5vw, 1.75rem); margin-bottom: 16px; color: var(--text-primary); } .cta-strip__body { font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-secondary); max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto 24px; line-height: 1.7; } .cta-strip__pills { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 24px; } .cta-pill { padding: 6px 14px; background: var(--surface); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 100px; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--primary); font-family: var(--font-body); } .cta-strip .cta--full { max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-strip__sub { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 10px; } .cta-strip__disclaimer { font-size: 0.78rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 20px; opacity: 0.7; max-width: 500px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } /* ============================================================ 18. SECTION 14 — FOOTER ============================================================ */ .footer { background: var(--bg-dark); color: #E8F0E8; } /* Live ticker */ .live-ticker { background: rgba(15, 138, 110, 0.15); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(15, 138, 110, 0.2); padding: 10px 20px; text-align: center; } .ticker__inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; } .ticker__icon { font-size: 1rem; } #tickerContent { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #A8D8A8; font-family: var(--font-body); font-weight: 500; } /* Countdown bar */ .countdown-bar { background: rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.12); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(26, 122, 60, 0.15); padding: 14px 20px; } .countdown-bar .container { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .countdown__label { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #A8D8A8; font-family: var(--font-body); font-weight: 500; } .countdown__digits { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .countdown__unit { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; min-width: 44px; } .countdown__num { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 1.4rem; font-weight: 500; color: #FFFFFF; line-height: 1; } .countdown__unit-label { font-size: 0.65rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.7); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-family: var(--font-body); } .countdown__sep { font-size: 1.2rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.5); font-family: var(--font-mono); padding-bottom: 12px; } /* Footer main */ .footer__main { padding: 40px 0 32px; } .footer__main .container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; } .footer__brand {} .footer__wordmark { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #FFFFFF; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; } .footer__tagline { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.7); } .footer__links { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; } .footer__link { font-size: 0.85rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.8); text-decoration: none; } .footer__link:hover { color: #FFFFFF; } .footer__legal { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.5); line-height: 1.6; } .footer__disclaimer { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.45); line-height: 1.6; } .footer__copy { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(168, 216, 168, 0.4); } /* ============================================================ 19. STICKY CTA BAR (Mobile only) ============================================================ */ .sticky-cta { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; background: var(--surface); border-top: 1px solid var(--border); padding: 10px 16px; padding-bottom: calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; z-index: 100; box-shadow: 0 -2px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); opacity: 0; transform: translateY(100%); transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; } .sticky-cta--visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } .sticky-cta__info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; } .sticky-cta__label { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-muted); } .sticky-cta__price { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary); } .sticky-cta__btn { padding: 10px 18px; font-size: 0.9rem; min-height: 44px; white-space: nowrap; } /* ============================================================ 20. RESPONSIVE — 640px ============================================================ */ @media (min-width: 640px) { .testi-card { flex: 0 0 calc(50% - 8px); } .proof-bar__divider { display: block; } .hero__proof-bar { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .reframe__segment-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .sticky-cta { display: flex; } body { padding-bottom: 80px; } } /* ============================================================ 21. RESPONSIVE — 768px (Tablet) ============================================================ */ @media (min-width: 768px) { :root { --section-pad-v: 80px; --section-pad-h: 32px; } .hero__inner { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; gap: 48px; } .hero__content { flex: 1; } .hero__visual { flex: 0 0 300px; } .mockup-doc { max-width: 300px; } .hero__proof-bar { flex-direction: row; flex-wrap: wrap; } .deliverables__grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .testi-card { flex: 0 0 calc(50% - 8px); } } /* ============================================================ 22. RESPONSIVE — 1024px (Desktop) ============================================================ */ @media (min-width: 1024px) { :root { --section-pad-v: 100px; --container: 900px; } .testi-card { flex: 0 0 calc(33.333% - 11px); } .deliverables__grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .reframe__segment-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); } .hero__visual { flex: 0 0 340px; } .sticky-cta { display: none !important; } body { padding-bottom: 0; } } /* ============================================================ 23. RESPONSIVE — 1280px (Wide) ============================================================ */ @media (min-width: 1280px) { :root { --container: 1000px; --section-pad-v: 112px; } } /* ============================================================ 24. PRINT ============================================================ */ @media print { .sticky-cta, .countdown-bar, .live-ticker { display: none !important; } } /* ============================================================ 25. FOCUS STYLES (Accessibility) ============================================================ */ :focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--primary); outline-offset: 3px; border-radius: 4px; } /* ============================================================ 26. REDUCED MOTION ============================================================ */ @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { *, *::before, *::after { animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; } } ``` --- ===FILE:lp-image-manifest.json=== ```json { "version": "1.0", "product_slug": "plantrade", "output_dir": "lp-assets", "assets": [ { "name": "hero", Test | | Samsung Galaxy A series | 360px | ⬜ Test | | iPhone 14 | 390px | ⬜ Test | | Large Android (A54) | 414px | ⬜ Test | | iPad / Tab | 768px | ⬜ Test | | Desktop 1280px | 1280px | ⬜ Test | Use Chrome DevTools Device Toolbar for emulation. Test on real device for Samsung Internet compatibility. --- ## CRITICAL — LAUNCH BLOCKERS - [ ] **Hero CTA visible above fold at 320px width** — open DevTools, set to 320px, verify "📦 Akses PlanTrade Sekarang — Rp 99k" button is fully visible without scrolling. Hero block height ≤ 568px at this width. - [ ] **No horizontal scroll** — at all tested widths (320 / 375 / 390 / 414 / 768 / 1024). Common culprits: `.mockup-doc` fixed width, `.testi-track` overflow. - [ ] **Page weight < 1 MB** — Chrome DevTools → Network → Disable cache → reload → check total transferred. - [ ] **Mobile PageSpeed Score ≥ 80** — test at pagespeed.web.dev after deploy. - [ ] **CTA tap targets ≥ 44×44px** — primary CTAs, FAQ summary rows, footer links. --- ## 12-POINT CHECKLIST ### 1. CTA Above Fold (320px) - [ ] Open 320px width in DevTools - [ ] "📦 Akses PlanTrade Sekarang — Rp 99k" button fully visible without scrolling - [ ] Hero block height within 568px (iPhone SE viewport) ### 2. Tap Targets - [ ] All `.cta` buttons: min-height 52px ✓ (set in CSS) - [ ] FAQ `.faq__q` summary rows: min-height 56px ✓ (set in CSS) - [ ] Footer links: tap area ≥ 44px (check padding) - [ ] Sticky CTA button: min-height 44px ✓ ### 3. Body Font Size - [ ] Body text renders at 16px minimum on all tested widths - [ ] No `.pricing__disclaimer`, `.footer__legal` text below 12px (set at 0.78rem = 12.5px — acceptable for legal text) ### 4. Line Length - [ ] Body paragraphs max ~65–70 chars per line on mobile - [ ] Hero headline ≤ 12 kata per line — check at 320px - [ ] `.container` max-width set to 720px — enforces line length ### 5. Page Weight - [ ] HTML + CSS + JS inline: target < 100 KB - [ ] After post-process (Pexels images fetched): < 1 MB total - [ ] Hero image (hero.jpg) compressed < 200 KB - [ ] Google Fonts load: 2 families (Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter) — each ~20-30 KB ### 6. Page Load (3G Simulation) - [ ] Chrome DevTools → Network → Slow 3G → reload - [ ] First Contentful Paint < 2 sec - [ ] Hero CTA visible < 1.5 sec - [ ] Time to Interactive < 3.5 sec ### 7. No Horizontal Scroll - [ ] 320px: no horizontal scroll - [ ] 375px: no horizontal scroll - [ ] 414px: no horizontal scroll - [ ] 768px: no horizontal scroll - [ ] Check `.hero__inner` flex layout at tablet width - [ ] Check `.mockup-doc` does not overflow on narrow screens ### 8. Touch / Interactive Elements - [ ] Testimonial carousel: touch swipe works on real mobile - [ ] Carousel auto-scrolls every 3.5 sec (pauses on touch) ✓ - [ ] FAQ accordion: tap opens/closes smoothly - [ ] Sticky CTA: appears after scrolling 600px ✓ - [ ] All `` scroll anchors work (smooth scroll) - [ ] Countdown timer ticking live ✓ ### 9. Form (N/A — Scalev injects) - [ ] Confirm NO `
` element in LP HTML ✓ (Section 12 = CTA strip only, no form fields) - [ ] Confirm NO payment method badges in HTML ✓ - [ ] Confirm Scalev checkout injection point exists (CTA buttons anchor to `#pricing` or Scalev embed target) ### 10. Safe Area Insets (iPhone Notch / Home Indicator) - [ ] Sticky CTA uses `padding-bottom: calc(10px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))` ✓ (set in CSS) - [ ] Viewport meta includes `viewport-fit=cover` ✓ - [ ] Footer content not cut off by home indicator on iPhone 14 ### 11. OG Image Preview - [ ] OG image `lp-assets/hero.jpg` is 1200×630 after Pexels fetch - [ ] Test Facebook Debugger: developers.facebook.com/tools/debug - [ ] Test WhatsApp: paste LP URL in WA test chat — preview shows image - [ ] Twitter Card Validator: og:title + image renders as `summary_large_image` - [ ] Confirm `og:url` updated to real deploy URL (currently `https://plantrade.id/` — update before launch) ### 12. Accessibility Basics - [ ] Single `

` on page (in `
`) ✓ - [ ] Heading hierarchy: H1 → H2 → H3, no skips ✓ - [ ] All `` have descriptive `alt` text ✓ - [ ] Color contrast: green #1A7A3C on white #FAFAFA = 5.8:1 ✓ (passes WCAG AA) - [ ] Color contrast: text #1A1F1A on #FAFAFA = 17.2:1 ✓ - [ ] Color contrast: muted #7A8C7A on white — check (target ≥ 4.5:1 for small text) - [ ] Focus visible states: `:focus-visible` outline on all interactive elements ✓ - [ ] `aria-labelledby` on all `

/` — keyboard accessible ✓ --- ## BROWSER MATRIX | Browser | Mobile | Desktop | Priority | |---------|--------|---------|----------| | Chrome for Android | ⬜ | ⬜ | Critical | | Safari iOS | ⬜ | — | Critical | | Samsung Internet | ⬜ | — | Critical (30%+ ID market) | | Firefox Android | ⬜ | ⬜ | Optional | | Edge | — | ⬜ | Optional | --- ## PERFORMANCE TARGETS | Metric | Target | Tool | |--------|--------|------| | LCP | < 2.5 sec | PageSpeed Insights | | CLS | < 0.1 | PageSpeed Insights | | FID / INP | < 100 ms | PageSpeed Insights | | Mobile Score | ≥ 80 | PageSpeed Insights | | Total Size | < 1 MB | DevTools Network | --- ## PLANTRADE-SPECIFIC CHECKS - [ ] Countdown reaches zero gracefully (displays 00:00:00:00, no NaN) - [ ] Live ticker updates every 6 seconds — visible on mobile - [ ] "Rp" formatting in pricing uses non-breaking space (Rp 99.000) - [ ] Legal disclaimer visible on Section 10, Section 12, and Footer - [ ] No `passive income` / `dijamin profit` / `pasti cuan` phrases anywhere — forbidden phrases check ✓ - [ ] `.pricing__tier-price--main` (Rp 99.000) has no emoji ✓ --- ## PRE-PUBLISH FINAL GATE Don't publish if ANY of these fail: -
